---
title: "Welcome to THK-AI Research Cluster"
lang: en
---

[Deutsche Version](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .hero-btn}

:::{.landing-hero}
![](figures/logos/THK-AI-Absenderkennung-EN.png){.hero-logo}

## The central contact point for AI at TH Köln

:::

## Latest News

:::{.feature-grid}
:::{.feature-card}
![](figures/news/mcdm2026-report/bartz-beielstein-mcdm.jpeg){.feature-card-image fig-alt="Thomas Bartz-Beielstein giving his talk at MCDM 2026 in Wuppertal"}

### MCDM 2026 in Wuppertal: Bartz-Beielstein presents results from the Everllence cooperation

`2026-06-18` -- [Prof. Dr. Thomas Bartz-Beielstein](https://www.th-koeln.de/personen/thomas.bartz-beielstein/) presented results from the long-standing cooperation with Everllence SE at MCDM 2026 in Wuppertal. The corresponding paper is available on [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.21989); in Wuppertal he received valuable feedback and held stimulating discussions with leading researchers in multi-objective optimization.

[Read more](news/mcdm2026-report/mcdm2026-report-en.md){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::{.feature-card}
![](figures/news/ecip-gecco-2026/gecco-hero.png){.feature-card-image fig-alt="GECCO 2026 banner, Costa Rica"}

### ECiP @ GECCO 2026: Bartz-Beielstein organizes the industry track in Costa Rica

`2026-06-18` -- [Prof. Dr. Thomas Bartz-Beielstein](https://www.th-koeln.de/personen/thomas.bartz-beielstein/) is once again organizing the renowned *Evolutionary Computation in Practice* (ECiP) track at GECCO 2026 in Costa Rica. Nicolás Álvarez Gil (ArcelorMittal Global R&D, Spain) and Ryoki Hamano (CyberAgent, Inc., Japan) have already confirmed for the session on 16 July 2026.

[Read more](news/ecip-gecco-2026/ecip-gecco-2026-en.md){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::

[All news in the THK-AI Newsroom](news.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Members

![Founding members](figures/members/founding_members_low.png){.team-mosaic fig-alt="Founding members of the THK-AI Cluster"}


::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
### Collaboration
With more than 20 professors from TH Köln, the THK-AI Research Cluster is one of the largest AI research collaborations at a German university of applied sciences.
:::



## Why THK-AI?

:::{.feature-grid}
:::{.feature-card}
### Applied AI at scale

THK-AI combines powerful compute infrastructure with interdisciplinary expertise to bring AI from idea to deployable prototype.
:::

:::{.feature-card}
### Open for collaboration

The cluster supports joint projects between associations, companies, professors, and students from different disciplines.
:::

:::

## THK-AI Example Project

![](figures/hpc/TH-KIplus_Monika%20Probst.jpg){.hero-image fig-alt="THK-AI research context"}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
The THK-KIplus project (TH Köln – Künstliche Intelligenz plus) was funded from June 2023 to November 2025 under the KI-Nachwuchs@FH programme by the German Federal Ministry for Research, Technology and Space. The initiative received *around EUR 1.3 million* in funding and has built one of the most powerful AI-oriented research infrastructures at German universities of applied sciences.
:::

## Focus areas

:::{.feature-grid}
:::{.feature-card}
### Critical infrastructure

Robust AI methods for autonomous and safety-critical systems.
:::

:::{.feature-card}
### Socially interactive AI agents

Socio-empathic AI-based dialogue and hybrid avatars for social innovation.
:::

:::

## CAIRNE Gold Member

![](figures/logos/Outlook-2d2n4pxp.png){fig-alt="CAIRNE logo" width="80%"}

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
The THK-AI Research Cluster is a **Gold Member** of the **CAIRNE Research Network** (Confederation of Laboratories for Artificial Intelligence Research in Europe).

CAIRNE is a European non-profit AI community with a human-centred focus. The network connects research institutions, industry, and policy stakeholders to strengthen European AI excellence, collaboration, and digital sovereignty.
:::



[Learn more about CAIRNE](https://cairne.eu){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Read more about THK-AI](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}

## Join and connect

If you are looking for collaboration, student projects, or partnerships in applied AI, THK-AI is your central contact point at TH Köln.

[Contact and About](about.qmd){.btn .btn-success}
[Teaching and offerings](lehre.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
